version_description:
v2: Premier MD conversion
- Flow fix: removed [SA] Medical History (Premier MD does not collect medical history during scheduling)
- Test updates: removed medical history references from 15 simulation test prompts and metrics
- Identity: Bea → Ella (global prompt + End Call node)
- Time context: wrapped bare is_open and can_schedule_same_day in {{}} (TTH Direct Request)
- Knowledge bases: added 3 KBs (Manually added FAQs, Site w/ FAQs, General Info)
- Integration tests: 44/44 pass on parent agent
